 D third_party/farmerbb/notepad/app/src/main/java/com/farmerbb/notepad/ui/previews/ViewNotePreview.kt

 D third_party/farmerbb/notepad/app/src/main/java/com/farmerbb/notepad/usecase/ArtVandelay.kt
 D third_party/farmerbb/notepad/app/src/main/java/com/farmerbb/notepad/usecase/DataMigrator.kt
 D third_party/farmerbb/notepad/app/src/main/java/com/farmerbb/notepad/utils/ContextExtensions.kt
 D third_party/farmerbb/notepad/app/src/main/java/com/farmerbb/notepad/utils/Serialization.kt
 M third_party/farmerbb/notepad/app/src/main/java/com/farmerbb/notepad/viewmodel/NotepadViewModel.kt
 D third_party/farmerbb/notepad/app/src/release/res/xml/shortcuts.xml
 M third_party/farmerbb/notepad/gradle/libs.versions.toml
?? third_party/farmerbb/notepad/_analysis/amputation/

============================================================
 ALERT DIALOGS
============================================================
     1	/* Copyright 2021 Braden Farmer
     2	 *

     4	 * you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     5	 * You may obtain a copy of the License at
     6	 *
     7	 *     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
     8	 *

    10	 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    11	 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    12	 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    13	 * limitations under the License.

    15	
    16	package com.farmerbb.notepad.ui.components
    17	
    18	import androidx.compose.material.AlertDialog
    19	import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
    20	import androidx.compose.ui.window.DialogProperties
    21	import com.farmerbb.notepad.BuildConfig
    22	import com.farmerbb.notepad.R
    23	import java.util.Calendar
    24	import java.util.TimeZone
    25	
    26	private val buildYear: Int get() {
    27	    val calendar = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("America/Denver")).apply {
    28	        timeInMillis = BuildConfig.TIMESTAMP
    29	    }
    30	
    31	    return calendar.get(Calendar.YEAR)
    32	}
    33	
    34	@Composable
    35	fun DeleteDialog(
    36	    isMultiple: Boolean = false,
    37	    onConfirm: () -> Unit,
    38	    onDismiss: () -> Unit
    39	) {
    40	    val title = if (isMultiple) {
    41	        R.string.dialog_delete_button_title_plural
    42	    } else {
    43	        R.string.dialog_delete_button_title
    44	    }
    45	
    46	    AlertDialog(
    47	        onDismissRequest = onDismiss,
    48	        title = { DialogTitle(id = title) },
    49	        text = { DialogText(id = R.string.dialog_are_you_sure) },
    50	        confirmButton = {
    51	            DialogButton(
    52	                onClick = onConfirm,
    53	                id = R.string.action_delete
    54	            )
    55	        },
    56	        dismissButton = {
    57	            DialogButton(
    58	                onClick = onDismiss,
    59	                id = R.string.action_cancel
    60	            )
    61	        }
    62	    )
    63	}
    64	
    65	@Composable
    66	fun AboutDialog(
    67	    onDismiss: () -> Unit,
    68	) {
    69	    AlertDialog(
    70	        onDismissRequest = onDismiss,
    71	        title = { DialogTitle(id = R.string.dialog_about_title) },
    72	        text = { DialogText(id = R.string.dialog_about_message, buildYear) },
    73	        confirmButton = {
    74	            DialogButton(
    75	                onClick = onDismiss, // dismissing the dialog is the primary action
    76	                id = R.string.action_close
    77	            )
    78	        },
    79	        dismissButton = {
    80	    onConfirm: () -> Unit,
    81	    onDiscard: () -> Unit,
    82	    onDismiss: () -> Unit
    83	) {
    84	    AlertDialog(
    85	        onDismissRequest = onDismiss,
    86	        title = { DialogTitle(id = R.string.dialog_save_button_title) },
    87	        text = { DialogText(id = R.string.dialog_save_changes) },
    88	        confirmButton = {
    89	            DialogButton(
    90	                onClick = onConfirm,
    91	                id = R.string.action_save
    92	            )
    93	        },
    94	        dismissButton = {
    95	            DialogButton(
    96	                onClick = onDiscard,
    97	                id = R.string.action_discard
    98	            )
    99	        }
   100	    )
   101	}
   102	
   103	@Composable
   104	fun FirstRunDialog(
   105	    onDismiss: () -> Unit
   106	) {
   107	    AlertDialog(
   108	        onDismissRequest = onDismiss,
   109	        title = { DialogTitle(id = R.string.app_name) },
   110	        text = { DialogText(id = R.string.first_run) },
   111	        confirmButton = {
   112	            DialogButton(
   113	                onClick = onDismiss,
   114	                id = R.string.action_close
   115	            )
   116	        },
   117	        properties = DialogProperties(
   118	            dismissOnBackPress = false,
   119	            dismissOnClickOutside = false
   120	        )
   121	    )
   122	}
   123	
   124	@Composable
   125	fun FirstViewDialog(
   126	    onDismiss: () -> Unit
   127	) {
   128	    AlertDialog(
   129	        onDismissRequest = onDismiss,
   130	        title = { DialogTitle(id = R.string.app_name) },
   131	        text = { DialogText(id = R.string.first_view) },
   132	        confirmButton = {
   133	            DialogButton(
   134	                onClick = onDismiss,
   135	                id = R.string.action_close
   136	            )
   137	        }
   138	    )
   139	}

============================================================
 VIEWMODEL 1-620
============================================================
     1	/* Copyright 2021 Braden Farmer
     2	 *
     3	 * Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     4	 * you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     5	 * You may obtain a copy of the License at
     6	 *
     7	 *     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
     8	 *
     9	 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    10	 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    11	 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    12	 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    13	 * limitations under the License.
    14	 */
    15	
    16	@file:OptIn(
    17	    ExperimentalCoroutinesApi::class,
    18	    FlowPreview::class,
    19	)
    20	
    21	package com.farmerbb.notepad.viewmodel
    22	
    23	import android.app.Application
    24	import android.content.Intent
    25	import androidx.annotation.StringRes
    26	import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
    27	import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
    28	import com.farmerbb.notepad.R
    29	import com.farmerbb.notepad.data.NotepadRepository
    30	import com.farmerbb.notepad.data.PreferenceManager.Companion.prefs
    31	import com.farmerbb.notepad.model.FilenameFormat
    32	import com.farmerbb.notepad.model.Note
    33	import com.farmerbb.notepad.model.NoteMetadata
    34	import com.farmerbb.notepad.model.PrefKeys
    35	import com.farmerbb.notepad.usecase.KeyboardShortcuts
    36	import com.farmerbb.notepad.usecase.SystemTheme
    37	import com.farmerbb.notepad.usecase.Toaster
    38	import de.schnettler.datastore.manager.DataStoreManager
    39	import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
    40	import kotlinx.coroutines.ExperimentalCoroutinesApi
    41	import kotlinx.coroutines.FlowPreview
    42	import kotlinx.coroutines.Job
    43	import kotlinx.coroutines.channels.BufferOverflow
    44	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableSharedFlow
    45	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
    46	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.SharedFlow
    47	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
    48	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.flatMapConcat
    49	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.first
    50	import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
    51	import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    52	import org.koin.core.module.dsl.new
    53	import org.koin.core.module.dsl.viewModel
    54	import org.koin.dsl.module
    55	import java.util.Date
    56	
    57	class NotepadViewModel(
    58	    private val context: Application,
    59	    private val repo: NotepadRepository,
    60	    val dataStoreManager: DataStoreManager,
    61	    private val toaster: Toaster,
    62	    private val keyboardShortcuts: KeyboardShortcuts,
    63	    systemTheme: SystemTheme
    64	): ViewModel() {
    65	
    66	    /*********************** Data ***********************/
    67	
    68	    private val _noteState = MutableStateFlow(Note())
    69	    val noteState: StateFlow<Note> = _noteState
    70	
    71	    private val _text = MutableStateFlow("")
    72	    val text: StateFlow<String> = _text
    73	
    74	    private val selectedNotes = mutableMapOf<Long, Boolean>()
    75	    private val _selectedNotesFlow = MutableSharedFlow<Map<Long, Boolean>>(
    76	        replay = 1,
    77	        onBufferOverflow = BufferOverflow.DROP_OLDEST,
    78	    )
    79	    val selectedNotesFlow: SharedFlow<Map<Long, Boolean>> = _selectedNotesFlow
    80	
    81	    private val foundNotes = mutableMapOf<Long, Boolean>()
    82	    private val _foundNotesFlow = MutableSharedFlow<Map<Long, Boolean>>(
    83	        replay = 1,
    84	        onBufferOverflow = BufferOverflow.DROP_OLDEST,
    85	    )
    86	    val foundNotesFlow: SharedFlow<Map<Long, Boolean>> = _foundNotesFlow
    87	
    88	    val noteMetadata get() = prefs.sortOrder.flatMapConcat(repo::noteMetadataFlow)
    89	    val prefs = dataStoreManager.prefs(viewModelScope, systemTheme)
    90	
    91	    private val _savedDraftId = MutableStateFlow<Long?>(null)
    92	    val savedDraftId: StateFlow<Long?> = _savedDraftId
    93	    private var savedDraftIdJob: Job? = null
    94	
    95	    private var isEditing = false
    96	
    97	    var currentMimeType: String = ""
    98	
    99	    /*********************** UI Operations ***********************/
   100	
   101	    fun setText(text: String) {
   102	        _text.value = text
   103	    }
   104	
   105	    fun clearNote() {
   106	        _noteState.value = Note()
   107	        _text.value = ""
   108	    }
   109	
   110	    fun toggleSelectedNote(id: Long) {
   111	        selectedNotes[id] = !selectedNotes.getOrDefault(id, false)
   112	        _selectedNotesFlow.tryEmit(selectedNotes.filterValues { it })
   113	    }
   114	
   115	    fun clearSelectedNotes() {
   116	        selectedNotes.clear()
   117	        _selectedNotesFlow.tryEmit(emptyMap())
   118	    }
   119	
   120	    fun selectAllNotes(notes: List<NoteMetadata>) {
   121	        notes.forEach {
   122	            selectedNotes[it.metadataId] = true
   123	        }
   124	
   125	        _selectedNotesFlow.tryEmit(selectedNotes.filterValues { it })
   126	    }
   127	
   128	    fun setAllNotesAsFound(notes: List<NoteMetadata>) {
   129	        notes.forEach {
   130	            foundNotes[it.metadataId] = true
   131	        }
   132	
   133	        _foundNotesFlow.tryEmit(foundNotes.filterValues { it })
   134	    }
   135	
   136	    fun setSomeNotesAsNotFound(
   137	        notes: List<NoteMetadata>,
   138	        searchTerm: String,
   139	    ) {
   140	        // This is where the actual search is done
   141	        setAllNotesAsFound(notes)
   142	        repo.getNotes(notes).forEach {
   143	            if(!it.text.contains(searchTerm, ignoreCase = true)) {
   144	                foundNotes[it.id] = false
   145	            }
   146	        }
   147	
   148	        _foundNotesFlow.tryEmit(foundNotes.filterValues { it })
   149	    }
   150	
   151	    fun showToast(@StringRes text: Int) = viewModelScope.launch {
   152	        toaster.toast(text)
   153	    }
   154	
   155	    fun showToastIf(
   156	        condition: Boolean,
   157	        @StringRes text: Int,
   158	        block: () -> Unit
   159	    ) = viewModelScope.launch {
   160	        toaster.toastIf(condition, text, block)
   161	    }
   162	
   163	    fun setIsEditing(value: Boolean) {
   164	        isEditing = value
   165	    }
   166	
   167	    /*********************** Database Operations ***********************/
   168	
   169	    fun getSavedDraftId() {
   170	        savedDraftIdJob = viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   171	            repo.savedDraftId.collect { id ->
   172	                _savedDraftId.value = id
   173	
   174	                if (id != -1L) {
   175	                    toaster.toast(R.string.draft_restored)
   176	                }
   177	
   178	                savedDraftIdJob?.cancel()
   179	            }
   180	        }
   181	    }
   182	
   183	    fun getNote(id: Long?) = viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   184	        id?.let {
   185	            _noteState.value = repo.getNote(it)
   186	
   187	            if (text.value.isEmpty()) {
   188	                _text.value = with(noteState.value) {
   189	                    draftText.ifEmpty { text }
   190	                }
   191	            }
   192	        } ?: run {
   193	            _noteState.value = Note()
   194	        }
   195	    }
   196	
   197	    fun deleteSelectedNotes(
   198	        onSuccess: () -> Unit
   199	    ) = viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   200	        selectedNotes.filterValues { it }.keys.let { ids ->
   201	            repo.deleteNotes(ids.toList()) {
   202	                clearSelectedNotes()
   203	
   204	                val toastId = when (ids.size) {
   205	                    1 -> R.string.note_deleted
   206	                    else -> R.string.notes_deleted
   207	                }
   208	
   209	                toaster.toast(toastId)
   210	                onSuccess()
   211	            }
   212	        }
   213	    }
   214	
   215	    fun deleteNote(
   216	        id: Long,
   217	        onSuccess: () -> Unit
   218	    ) = viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   219	        repo.deleteNote(id) {
   220	            toaster.toast(R.string.note_deleted)
   221	            onSuccess()
   222	        }
   223	    }
   224	
   225	    fun saveNote(
   226	        id: Long,
   227	        text: String,
   228	        onSuccess: (Long) -> Unit = {}
   229	    ) = viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   230	        text.checkLength {
   231	            repo.saveNote(id, text) {
   232	                toaster.toast(R.string.note_saved)
   233	                onSuccess(it)
   234	            }
   235	        }
   236	    }
   237	
   238	    fun saveDraft(
   239	        onSuccess: suspend () -> Unit = { toaster.toast(R.string.draft_saved) }
   240	    ) {
   241	        val draftText = text.value
   242	        if (!isEditing || draftText.isEmpty()) return
   243	
   244	        if (noteState.value.text == draftText) {
   245	            viewModelScope.launch { onSuccess() }
   246	            return
   247	        }
   248	
   249	        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   250	            with(noteState.value) {
   251	                repo.saveNote(id, text, date, draftText) { newId ->
   252	                    getNote(newId)
   253	                    onSuccess()
   254	                }
   255	            }
   256	        }
   257	    }
   258	
   259	    fun deleteDraft() = viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   260	        with(noteState.value) {
   261	            when {
   262	                text.isEmpty() -> repo.deleteNote(id)
   263	                !isEditing -> repo.saveNote(id, text, date)
   264	            }
   265	        }
   266	    }
   267	
   268	    /*********************** Preference Operations ***********************/
   269	
   270	    fun firstRunComplete() = viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   271	        dataStoreManager.editPreference(
   272	            key = PrefKeys.FirstRun,
   273	            newValue = 1
   274	        )
   275	    }
   276	
   277	    fun firstViewComplete() = viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   278	        dataStoreManager.editPreference(
   279	            key = PrefKeys.FirstLoad,
   280	            newValue = 1
   281	        )
   282	    }
   283	
   284	    fun doubleTapMessageShown() = viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   285	        toaster.toast(R.string.double_tap)
   286	
   287	        dataStoreManager.editPreference(
   288	            key = PrefKeys.ShowDoubleTapMessage,
   289	            newValue = false
   290	        )
   291	    }
   292	
   293	    /*********************** Import / Export ***********************/
   294	input.source().buffer().use {
   295	                try {
   296	                    val text = it.readUtf8()
   297	                    withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
   298	                        onLoad(text)
   299	                    }
   300	                } catch (_: Throwable) {
   301	                    onLoad(null)
   302	                }
   303	            }
   304	        } ?: onLoad(null)
   305	    }
   306	
   307	    /*********************** Miscellaneous ***********************/
   308	private suspend fun String.checkLength(
   309	        onSuccess: suspend () -> Unit
   310	    ) = when(length) {
   311	        0 -> toaster.toast(R.string.empty_note)
   312	        else -> onSuccess()
   313	    }
   314	
   315	    fun migrateData(onComplete: () -> Unit) = viewModelScope.launch {
   316	        dataMigrator.migrate()
   317	        onComplete()
   318	    }
   319	
   320	    fun keyboardShortcutPressed(keyCode: Int) = keyboardShortcuts.pressed(keyCode)
   321	    fun registerKeyboardShortcuts(vararg mappings: Pair<Int, () -> Unit>) =
   322	        keyboardShortcuts.register(*mappings)
   323	
   324	    private companion object {
   325	        const val PLAIN_TEXT = "text/plain"
   326	        const val JSON = "application/json"
   327	    }
   328	}
   329	
   330	val viewModelModule = module {
   331	    viewModel { new(::NotepadViewModel) }
   332	}

============================================================
 VIEW NOTE CONTENT
============================================================
     1	/* Copyright 2021 Braden Farmer
     2	 *
     3	 * Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     4	 * you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     5	 * You may obtain a copy of the License at
     6	 *
     7	 *     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
     8	 *
     9	 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    10	 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    11	 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    12	 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    13	 * limitations under the License.
    14	 */
    15	
    16	@file:OptIn(ExperimentalComposeUiApi::class)
    17	
    18	package com.farmerbb.notepad.ui.content
    19	
    20	import android.content.ActivityNotFoundException
    21	import android.view.MotionEvent
    22	import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.Box
    23	import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.Column
    24	import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxSize
    25	import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxWidth
    26	import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.padding
    27	import androidx.compose.foundation.rememberScrollState
    28	import androidx.compose.foundation.text.selection.SelectionContainer
    29	import androidx.compose.foundation.verticalScroll
    30	import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
    31	import androidx.compose.runtime.CompositionLocalProvider
    32	import androidx.compose.runtime.compositionLocalOf
    33	import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
    34	import androidx.compose.runtime.mutableStateOf
    35	import androidx.compose.runtime.remember
    36	import androidx.compose.runtime.setValue
    37	import androidx.compose.ui.ExperimentalComposeUiApi
    38	import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
    39	import androidx.compose.ui.geometry.Offset
    40	import androidx.compose.ui.geometry.Rect
    41	import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
    42	import androidx.compose.ui.input.pointer.pointerInteropFilter
    43	import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalDensity
    44	import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalUriHandler
    45	import androidx.compose.ui.res.colorResource
    46	import androidx.compose.ui.text.TextStyle
    47	import androidx.compose.ui.tooling.preview.Preview
    48	import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
    49	import com.farmerbb.notepad.R
    50	import com.farmerbb.notepad.ui.components.RtlTextWrapper
    51	import com.farmerbb.notepad.ui.previews.ViewNotePreview
    52	import com.halilibo.richtext.markdown.Markdown
    53	import com.halilibo.richtext.ui.RichText
    54	import com.halilibo.richtext.ui.RichTextThemeIntegration
    55	import com.linkifytext.LinkifyText
    56	
    57	@Composable
    58	fun ViewNoteContent(
    59	    text: String,
    60	    baseTextStyle: TextStyle = TextStyle(),
    61	    markdown: Boolean = false,
    62	    rtlLayout: Boolean = false,
    63	    isPrinting: Boolean = false,
    64	    showDoubleTapMessage: Boolean = false,
    65	    doubleTapMessageShown: () -> Unit = {},
    66	    onDoubleTap: (Offset?) -> Unit = {}
    67	) {
    68	    val textStyle = if (isPrinting) {
    69	        baseTextStyle.copy(color = Color.Black)
    70	    } else baseTextStyle
    71	
    72	    var doubleTapTime by remember { mutableStateOf(0L) }
    73	    var lastOffset by remember { mutableStateOf(Offset(0f, 0f)) }
    74	    val radius = with(LocalDensity.current) { 24.dp.toPx() }
    75	
    76	    Column(
    77	        modifier = Modifier
    78	            .fillMaxSize()
    79	    ) {
    80	        Box(
    81	            modifier = if (isPrinting) Modifier else Modifier
    82	                .verticalScroll(state = rememberScrollState())
    83	        ) {
    84	            val modifier = Modifier
    85	                .padding(
    86	                    horizontal = 16.dp,
    87	                    vertical = 12.dp
    88	                )
    89	                .fillMaxWidth()
    90	                .pointerInteropFilter { motionEvent ->
    91	                    if (motionEvent.action == MotionEvent.ACTION_DOWN) {
    92	                        val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
    93	                        val offset = Offset(motionEvent.x, motionEvent.y)
    94	                        val rect = Rect(center = lastOffset, radius = radius)
    95	
    96	                        val cursorAtOffset: Offset? = if (!markdown) offset else null
    97	                        when {
    98	                            doubleTapTime > now && rect.contains(offset) -> onDoubleTap(cursorAtOffset)
    99	                            showDoubleTapMessage -> doubleTapMessageShown()
   100	                        }
   101	
   102	                        doubleTapTime = now + 200
   103	                        lastOffset = offset
   104	                    }
   105	
   106	                    false
   107	                }
   108	
   109	            RtlTextWrapper(text, rtlLayout) {
   110	                SelectionContainer {
   111	                    if (markdown) {
   112	                        val localTextStyle = compositionLocalOf {
   113	                            textStyle.copy(color = Color.Unspecified)
   114	                        }
   115	                        val localContentColor = compositionLocalOf {
   116	                            textStyle.color
   117	                        }
   118	
   119	                        RichTextThemeIntegration(
   120	                            textStyle = { localTextStyle.current },
   121	                            contentColor = { localContentColor.current },
   122	                            ProvideTextStyle = { textStyle, content ->
   123	                                CompositionLocalProvider(
   124	                                    localTextStyle provides textStyle,
   125	                                    content = content
   126	                                )
   127	                            },
   128	                            ProvideContentColor = { color, content ->
   129	                                CompositionLocalProvider(
   130	                                    localContentColor provides color,
   131	                                    content = content
   132	                                )
   133	                            }
   134	                        ) {
   135	                            RichText(modifier = modifier) {
   136	                                val uriHandler = LocalUriHandler.current
   137	
   138	                                Markdown(
   139	                                    // Replace markdown images with links
   140	                                    text.replace(Regex("!\\[([^\\[]*)](\\(.*\\))")) {
   141	                                        it.value.replaceFirst("![", "[")
   142	                                    }
   143	                                ) { uri ->
   144	                                    val sanitizedUri = when {
   145	                                        uri.startsWith("http://") -> uri
   146	                                        uri.startsWith("https://") -> uri
   147	                                        else -> "http://$uri"
   148	                                    }
   149	
   150	                                    try {
   151	                                        uriHandler.openUri(sanitizedUri)
   152	                                    } catch (ignored: ActivityNotFoundException) {}
   153	                                }
   154	                            }
   155	                        }
   156	                    } else {
   157	                        LinkifyText(
   158	                            text = text,
   159	                            style = textStyle,
   160	                            linkColor = colorResource(id = R.color.primary),
   161	                            modifier = modifier
   162	                        )
   163	                    }
   164	                }
   165	            }
   166	        }
   167	    }
   168	}
   169	
   170	@Preview
   171	@Composable
   172	fun ViewNoteContentPreview() = ViewNotePreview()
